title: acer truncatum f. barbinerve
intro: Acer truncatum f. barbinerve, also known as the Chinese maple or barbed-leaved maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Sapindaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Acer truncatum f. barbinerve include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various digestive issues, such as diarrhea and bloating. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark, leaves, and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
